name: policy-track-both-backends
description: POST /policy/track wire-parity across BOTH backends. As of the zero-Python Node self-sufficiency work the Node coordinator implements the policy-management surface (bin CLIs + /policy routes), so a track of a valid relative path returns the same {ok, added, rejected} body on Python and Node. (Renamed from the v0.1.1 'python-only' fixture, whose premise no longer holds.)
